user.title: Divoom Times Gate
user.description: Pick your device (auto-discovered on your network) or type its IP, then enter the LocalToken shown in the Divoom app under Device settings.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device, or the LocalToken was rejected. Check the IP and token.

abort.already_configured: This Times Gate is already configured.

init.title: Times Gate screens & faces
init.description: Screens: a list of 5 entries; each is a page or a list of pages (which rotate by 'duration'). Faces: your favorite device faces ({overall, per_screen}) shown in the Display source / Screen selects. See the README.

error.invalid_screens: Screens must be a list of page configs.
error.invalid_faces: Faces must be an object with 'overall' and 'per_screen' lists.
